_comment: External Repo Intake config — N+3.63A. All actions disabled by default.
openfang_ambiguity_note: Two separate OpenFang projects exist. aidiss/openfang is the Python gateway. RightNow-AI/openfang is the Rust Agent OS. Do not conflate.
moneyprinter_note: MoneyPrinter by DevBySami maps to FujiwaraChoki/MoneyPrinter. MoneyPrinterV2 is a separate higher-risk project.
safe_route: intake -> audit -> adapter_design -> local_dry_run -> human_review -> optional_live_integration
